form.label: Data Hygiene & Metrics Optimization Dashboard v3
form.description: Identify redundant data, metrics conversion candidates, and optimize Splunk data tiering

search.query: | rest /services/data/indexes | search disabled=0 title!="_*" title!="summary" title!="history" | stats count as total_indexes | appendcols [search index=_audit action=search earliest=-30d@d latest=now | rex field=search "index\s*=\s*(?<searched_index>\w+)" | stats dc(searched_index) as used_indexes] | eval score=round((used_indexes/total_indexes)*100,1) | eval score=coalesce(score,0) | fields score

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-30d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as total_bytes by st | rename st as sourcetype | join type=outer sourcetype [| tstats count WHERE index=* earliest=-30d@d latest=now BY sourcetype | where count=0] | where count=0 OR isnull(count) | eval monthly_gb=round(total_bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | eval annual_savings=monthly_gb*12 | stats sum(annual_savings) as total_savings | eval total_savings=round(coalesce(total_savings,0),0) | fields total_savings

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by st | rename st as sourcetype | eval is_metrics_candidate=if(match(sourcetype, "(?i)(metric|stats|perf|performance|cpu|memory|disk|network|usage|utilization)"), 1, 0) | where is_metrics_candidate=1 | stats count as candidates | eval candidates=coalesce(candidates,0) | fields candidates

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-30d@d latest=now | search st=*metric* OR st=*stats* OR st=*perf* OR st=*cpu* OR st=*memory* | stats sum(b) as total_bytes | eval monthly_gb=round(total_bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | eval annual_savings=round(monthly_gb*12*0.5,0) | eval annual_savings=coalesce(annual_savings,0) | fields annual_savings

| rest /services/data/indexes | search disabled=0 title!="_*" title!="summary" title!="history" | stats count as total_indexes | appendcols [search index=_audit action=search earliest=-30d@d latest=now | rex field=search "index\s*=\s*(?<searched_index>\w+)" | stats dc(searched_index) as used_indexes] | appendcols [search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as total_bytes by st | eval is_metrics_candidate=if(match(st, "(?i)(metric|stats|perf|performance|cpu|memory|disk|network|usage|utilization)"), 1, 0) | stats sum(eval(if(is_metrics_candidate=1,total_bytes,0))) as metrics_candidate_bytes, sum(total_bytes) as total_bytes | eval metrics_conversion_pct=round((metrics_candidate_bytes/total_bytes)*100,1)] | appendcols [search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-30d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by st | join type=outer st [| tstats count WHERE index=* earliest=-30d@d latest=now BY sourcetype | rename sourcetype as st] | eval is_unused=if(isnull(count) OR count=0, bytes, 0) | stats sum(is_unused) as unused_bytes, sum(bytes) as total_bytes | eval unused_ratio_pct=round((unused_bytes/total_bytes)*100,1)] | eval index_utilization=round((used_indexes/total_indexes)*100,1) | eval index_utilization=coalesce(index_utilization,0) | eval metrics_conversion_pct=coalesce(metrics_conversion_pct,0) | eval unused_ratio_pct=coalesce(unused_ratio_pct,0) | eval total_optimization=round((index_utilization*0.3 + metrics_conversion_pct*0.4 + (100-unused_ratio_pct)*0.3),1) | fields total_optimization

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by st | rename st as sourcetype | eval daily_gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024/7,2) | eval is_infrastructure=if(match(sourcetype, "(?i)(cpu|memory|disk|network|performance|metric|stats|system|infrastructure|container|docker|k8s|kubernetes|aws|azure|gcp|vmware)"), "Yes", "No") | eval is_metrics_candidate=if(match(sourcetype, "(?i)(metric|stats|perf|performance|cpu|memory|disk|network|usage|utilization)"), "Yes", "No") | eval kpi_score=case( is_infrastructure="Yes" AND is_metrics_candidate="Yes", 95, is_infrastructure="Yes", 70, is_metrics_candidate="Yes", 60, 1=1, 20) | eval recommendation=case( kpi_score >= 80, "HIGH - Convert to Metrics", kpi_score >= 60, "MEDIUM - Review for Metrics", kpi_score >= 40, "LOW - Partial Candidate", 1=1, "Keep as Logs") | eval annual_savings_gb=if(kpi_score>=60, daily_gb*365*0.5, 0) | table sourcetype daily_gb kpi_score recommendation annual_savings_gb | rename sourcetype as "Sourcetype", daily_gb as "Daily GB", kpi_score as "KPI Score", recommendation as "Recommendation", annual_savings_gb as "Est. Annual Savings GB" | sort - "KPI Score"

format.colorPalette: {"HIGH - Convert to Metrics":"#8ac926","MEDIUM - Review for Metrics":"#ffca3a","LOW - Partial Candidate":"#1982c4","Keep as Logs":"#ff595e"}

search.query: index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by st | rename st as sourcetype | eval gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | eval data_type=case( match(sourcetype, "(?i)(metric|stats|perf)"), "Metrics Candidate (>80% numeric)", match(sourcetype, "(?i)(log|event)"), "Event Logs", match(sourcetype, "(?i)(audit|security)"), "Security/Audit", 1=1, "Unstructured/Other") | stats sum(gb) as volume_gb by data_type | sort - volume_gb

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time, idx | rename idx as index | eval gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | join type=outer index [search index=_audit action=search earliest=-7d@d latest=now | rex field=search "index\s*=\s*[\"']?(?<index_name>[^\"'\s]+)" | stats count as searches by index_name | rename index_name as index] | eval searches=coalesce(searches,0) | eval utilization_score=case( searches=0, 0, searches<10, 10, searches<50, 30, searches<100, 50, 1=1, 100) | where utilization_score <= 30 | eval index_label=index." (".utilization_score."% util)" | timechart span=1d sum(gb) as "Volume (GB)" by index_label limit=5

index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by idx | rename idx as index | eval gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | join type=outer index [search index=_audit action=search earliest=-7d@d latest=now | rex field=search "index\s*=\s*[\"']?(?<index_used>[^\"'\s]+)" | stats count as search_count by index_used | rename index_used as index] | eval search_count=coalesce(search_count,0) | eval category=case( search_count > 100, "Active", search_count > 10, "Moderate", search_count > 0, "Low Activity", 1=1, "Unused") | eval sort_order=case( category="Active", 1, category="Moderate", 2, category="Low Activity", 3, category="Unused", 4) | stats sum(gb) as "Volume (GB)", count as "Index Count" by category, sort_order | sort sort_order | fields - sort_order | rename category as "Activity Level"

panel.title: Unused Sourcetypes - Prime Candidates for Removal

search.query: index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-30d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes latest(_time) as last_seen by st | rename st as sourcetype | eval size_gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | eval days_since_seen=round((now()-last_seen)/86400,0) | join type=outer sourcetype [| tstats latest(_time) as last_searched WHERE index=* earliest=-30d@d latest=now BY sourcetype | eval last_searched_time=last_searched] | eval days_since_search=if(isnotnull(last_searched_time), round((now()-last_searched_time)/86400,0), 999) | where days_since_search > $min_unused_days$ OR isnull(last_searched_time) | eval annual_gb_impact=size_gb*12 | eval action_required=case( days_since_search > 90 AND size_gb > 10, "CRITICAL - Disable Immediately", days_since_search > 60 AND size_gb > 5, "HIGH - Schedule for Removal", days_since_search > 30, "MEDIUM - Review with Owner", 1=1, "LOW - Monitor") | table sourcetype days_since_search size_gb annual_gb_impact action_required | rename sourcetype as "Sourcetype", days_since_search as "Days Unused", size_gb as "Monthly GB", annual_gb_impact as "Annual GB Impact", action_required as "Action Required" | sort - "Annual GB Impact" | head 20

format.colorPalette: {"CRITICAL - Disable Immediately":"#ff595e","HIGH - Schedule for Removal":"#ffca3a","MEDIUM - Review with Owner":"#1982c4","LOW - Monitor":"#8ac926"}

search.query: index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by idx | rename idx as index | eval gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | join type=outer index [search index=_audit action=search earliest=-7d@d latest=now | rex field=search "index\s*=\s*[\"']?(?<index_name>[^\"'\s]+)" | stats count as searches by index_name | rename index_name as index] | eval searches=coalesce(searches,0) | eval efficiency=case( searches=0, "UNUSED", searches<10, "Very Low", searches<50, "Low", searches<200, "Medium", 1=1, "High") | table index gb searches efficiency | rename index as "Index", gb as "Weekly GB", searches as "Search Count", efficiency as "Usage Efficiency" | sort - "Weekly GB" | head 20

| tstats count WHERE index=* earliest=-7d@d latest=now BY sourcetype, index | stats values(index) as indexes, dc(index) as index_count by sourcetype | where index_count > 1 | eval indexes_list=mvjoin(indexes,", ") | join type=left sourcetype [search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=-7d@d latest=now | stats sum(b) as bytes by st | rename st as sourcetype | eval daily_gb=round(bytes/1024/1024/1024/7,2)] | eval consolidation_savings=daily_gb*(index_count-1)*365 | table sourcetype index_count indexes_list daily_gb consolidation_savings | rename sourcetype as "Sourcetype", index_count as "Index Count", indexes_list as "Indexes", daily_gb as "Daily GB", consolidation_savings as "Annual Savings GB" | sort - consolidation_savings | head 10

| makeresults count=3 | streamstats count as row | eval priority=case(row=1,"CRITICAL",row=2,"HIGH",row=3,"MEDIUM") | eval action=case( row=1,"Remove Unused Data", row=2,"Convert to Metrics", row=3,"Consolidate Indexes") | eval target=case( row=1,"Sourcetypes unused >90 days", row=2,"Infrastructure/Performance Data", row=3,"Duplicate sourcetypes") | eval implementation=case( row=1,"Disable inputs or set retention=0", row=2,"Route to metrics index via transforms.conf", row=3,"Merge into single index") | eval estimated_savings=case( row=1,"20-40% license reduction", row=2,"40-60% storage reduction", row=3,"10-20% efficiency gain") | table priority action target estimated_savings implementation | rename priority as "Priority", action as "Action", target as "Target", estimated_savings as "Estimated Savings", implementation as "Implementation"
